review_title: You leave feeling above the clouds!
review_text_liked: I started writing this review before we left so i would not forget the multitude of positive points here at Atas Awan. So many positives we decided to stay an extra night. Although we have been before one forgets the beautiful uniqueness of this property. From stunning views to top quality food to amazing staff who cannot do enough for you its just been one totally perfect stay. Of course the gardens as well are a sight to be hold so well done to the garden team also. Here is perfect for just doing nothing really or perhaps reading or a game of cards or special time with your partner and if in to Yoga they have an excellent room for Yoga groups. Note no tv but who cares when you have scenery all around you.They do have good wifi just the same. If you are considering staying in central Bali and want to enjoy a beautiful temperate climate with no air con needed here is your perfect getaway. We of course will return and tell them when booking are 2 or more nights possible. In closing as past hoteliers we acknowledge in tropical humid climate maintenance is essential as wear and tear are always an issue for a property over time but here they do their utmost for your stay to be trouble free.
review_text_disliked: Our stay was trouble free and really did not have any issues.

review_text_liked: I loved staying here so very much. I loved the beautiful views & the well kept garden. The staff were so very helpful. I have dietary requirements & they couldn't help me enough. This is a very beautiful place to stay. My room was comfortable & I loved the day bed on the Verandah. I loved listening to the River & looking at the beautiful Ricefields.
review_text_disliked: Unfortunately there is a mould problem in the Bathroom. The room was fine when doors were opened but when closed up in the evening the smell of mould was strong. This is a real health hazard so needs to be addressed. Also I was a little disappointed in the food served. Granted I have special requirements which the staff helped me with but there were lots of things not available. I understand how difficult it is when you never know how many people you are going to serve but maybe the Menu could have less but all be available. I would so love to visit here again. But would need the Mould situation to be addressed first. I really had a beautiful stay. It's a shame about that one factor.

review_title: Beatful nature and house ruined by ants/termites problem
review_text_liked: First of all, the views. Wonderful! Beautiful! Okay, a little bit scary to arrive at the hotel with a bike, but it is worth it. The staff was very helpful and showed us around. There was a very spacious room with many pieces of furniture. The yoga at 7 AM is - the perfect way to wake up. The breakfast (included) and the dinner (excluded, but available to order extra) - nice and tasty. All in all, it was a refreshing and peaceful place to stay
review_text_disliked: Most uncomfortable were bugs (termites? ants? I am not sure), there were a lot of them. They invaded the drinking water, cups, plates, and every piece of food left unattended for several hours. There was no fridge, so there was no way to hide anything. They even entered my clothes, and I brought them to the next hotel. Scary!

review_text_liked: The location is beautiful. The garden has so many different plants and flowers it's an attraction by itself. Nearby there are nice hot springs you can walk too. They want you to book the tour for 100k IDR but you can also go by yourself and pay 45k. Also the general area is very nice. Loved the free yoga <3
review_text_disliked: The service is not good. They act very kind and as long as you don't need anything the atmosphere is very good. However, we had to wait an hour for our breakfast (just simple Mie goreng). It was serviced with two slices of plain watermelon and an unripe piece of pineapple. The mie itself was very nice though. We needed help with transport and she offered us a taxi more than twice the price of taxis on different apps. She could not be bargained with to reach a somewhat acceptable price. Furtermore, there were no water bottles in the room, which is a shame since there aren't a lot of shops around. Lastly, there are a lot of insects. I usually don't mind but a mosquito net would have been nice.

We needed help with transport and she offered us a taxi more than twice the price of taxis on different apps. She could not be bargained with to reach a somewhat acceptable price. Furtermore, there were no water bottles in the room, which is a shame since there aren't a lot of shops around. Lastly, there are a lot of insects. I usually don't mind but a mosquito net would have been nice.

review_title: Only if you want to live with bugs and mould smell.
review_text_liked: Village Above the Clouds has a very beautiful hotel premises with proper landscaping and scenic surroundings. At first glance, the property looks charming and promising. Unfortunately, the rooms were the worst experience of our entire Bali trip. The cleanliness was extremely poor, with a lot of dust everywhere. The outdated hay roofs appeared to be home to countless insects, making it very uncomfortable to stay in the room. The rooms were mouldy, and the smell was unbearable unless the windows were kept open at all times. Since our first room was in very poor condition, we requested a room change. We were shown a couple of other rooms, but all of them had similar cleanliness issues, clearly indicating that the rooms throughout the hotel are very poorly maintained. The cups provided in the room were stained and not cleaned properly, which was unhygienic. We requested a change of bedsheets for our second night, but this was not done, as the same visible stain was still present the next day. Our initial room also had a very dirty and outdated washroom with a broken shower and a stained commode. While the staff attempted to check the shower issue, a sudden flame appeared from the gas cylinder connected to the hot water system, placed right next to the washroom outside, which felt extremely unsafe. We could not sleep properly during the two nights due to stained, itchy bedsheets and the overall unhygienic condition of the room. Despite the beautiful surroundings, the rooms are outdated, poorly maintained, and the service and hygiene were extremely poor. Overall, this place is not worth the stay, and we do not recommend it at all.

review_title: Unless the management takes care of the maintenance of the cabins and trains their staff, unfortunately it’s not worth t
review_text_liked: Views are amazing and the gardens are very well taken care of. There’s a girl working at the restaurant who is the best. She remembered my wife from another stay and came to our room to ask if we wanted then to clean it, but she’s the only one like this. Rest of the staff is lazy and not helpful really.
review_text_disliked: Staff aren’t helpful and the customer service quality is very poor. When you arrive they are never in reception. It’s always empty, and you have to go look for them in the restaurant which is a long outdoor walk and makes it inconvenient if it’s raining (believe me I’ve been here 3 times and it’s always like this. Reception is always empty). We ordered tomato soup because we had sore throat, and when we noticed they made it spicy we asked them to change it and they said kitchen was closed (even though it was supposed to close 15 min later). The room was COMPLETELY FULL of bugs, including big spiders in the toilet, HUGE cockroaches in the roof, ants in the bed (and not just a few. I had to constantly remove ants from the bed and woke up at night with some walking on me), and even a frog on my dad’s bedroom. They should fog the place often or clean the bedrooms properly. When we arrived the whole bedroom smelled moldy and humid, and the bedsheets where humid and smelly also. The room doesn’t have AC or fan at all so you are basically stuck with the smell and the health hazard that mold is for your lungs and throat. The toilet had leakings and moldy walls also. We booked 2 suites for 2 nights (the most expensive rooms) and left earlier at 8:30pm on the second day. We didn’t use the second night after a massive cockroach walked on my head and hide inside our pillow (with another big one walking on the wall on top of the bed). We just had enough and wanted to go. Staff apologized and didn’t charge us for one of our food tickets (we would’ve preferred a reimbursement of the send day stay but what to do). It’s my 3rd time staying here and all these issues were there before although I didn’t mind to deal with them, but this time bugs and mold really became too much. I guess maintenance is not a priority, and staff doesn’t really help much.

review_text_liked: Village Above the Clouds Rating: 10/10 stars I've just returned from my stay at Village Above the Clouds, and I'm still under the spell of this magical place. From the moment I arrived, I knew I was in a special place. The staff was exceptional, attentive, and kind at all times. They made me feel like I was home, and their dedication and passion for the place were evident in every detail. The views are simply unique. Waking up every morning to the sunrise above the clouds is an experience I'll never forget. And the natural surroundings are impressive, with hiking trails, forests to explore, and a tranquility that's hard to find in other places. But what really sets Village Above the Clouds apart is the connection it allows you to establish with nature. It's a place where you can disconnect from daily routine and reconnect with the natural world. And to top it all off, the prices are exceptional. I felt like I was paying much less than the experience was worth. In short, Village Above the Clouds is an unforgettable place that I'll definitely visit again. If you're looking for a place to escape the routine and connect with nature, this is the perfect spot. Highlights: - Exceptional and attentive staff - Unique and breathtaking views - Impressive natural surroundings - Connection with nature - Exceptional prices Recommendation: If you're looking for a place to relax, connect with nature, and enjoy breathtaking views, Village Above the Clouds is the perfect place. Don't miss the opportunity to visit!
review_text_disliked: Everything was amazing, except they needed a good fan in the room because it was a little hot, but it's not much of a problem since the weather is perfect. review_text_liked: The wonderful experience of Village above the clouds begins as you walk towards the foyer and begin to experience the beautiful garden and the luscious colourful array of exotic plants. Whoever gardens and landscapes their spacious property and looks after all this deserves an award. The reception was friendly and informative. The rooms beautifully positioned and within their own traditional balinese style building. Whilst there are some cosmetic repair needs here and there (covid would have impacted this severely) the place overall looks great. The staff are an asset as well friendly and willing to meet your queries and needs at any time. We had lunch there straight away on their beautifully positioned deck overlooking the terraced rice fields meandering away into the descending spaces of the valley below. Stunning views and glowing yellows of the ripening rice crop. Lunch was excellent well presented and well priced. We skipped dinner but had a lovely sleep. Keep in mind with cloudless skies it gets cool up there. Breakfast was delicious, fresh fruit and a watermelon juice complimentary to a selection of warmer foods to chose from. We left reluctantly late morning but vowed to be back again as soon as possible. Stunning place.
review_text_disliked: There did not seem to be a sign up on the road to indicate the resort. The driveway/car park area on the upper side was a bit messy and the drive way road there pretty broken up. But I am sure this is on the repair list

review_text_liked: Mi è piaciuta molto l'architettura delle strutture, lo spazio dedicato allo yoga e alla colazione. Inoltre essere completamente immersi nella natura è stato davvero rilassante. Se si vogliono visitare le cascate nei dintorni, il lago di Bedugul e il relativo tempio, la posizione è abbastanza strategica.
review_text_disliked: Il luogo era abbastanza umido, ma noonostante ciò siamo state bene. Penso che sia difficile trattenere l'umidità in zone di questo tipo. Consiglio di cercare di capire se possibile individuare una soluzione per rendere il soggiorno davvero indimenticabile.

review_text_liked: Splendida location nelle montagne centrale. Isolata, ma allo stesso tempo buon punto di partenza per visitare la zona in auto. Abbiamo alloggiato in una casa a due piani con il tetto di paglia e una vista pazzesca sulle risaie e sulla giungla. Ho apprezzato molto lo yoga mattutino. Molto puliti i letti e i bagni, non posso dire lo stesso del pavimento. Colazione varia e molto buona. Ho gradito meno i pasti del pranzo e della cena per la minore scelta e perché a mio gusto erano meno saporiti di quelli mangiati in altre zone di Bali. Personale disponibile e pronto a soddisfare le nostre richieste.
review_text_disliked: Molto fastidiose le mosche al ristorante

review_title: Simplemente correcto, ni bien ni mal
review_text_liked: Las vistas son muy bonitas, está decorado con mucho gusto y los exteriores del hotel son muy muy bonitos. El personal es muy muy amable y te ayudan en todo lo que pueden. El restaurante está muy rico y bien de precio, algo más caro que en otros sitios pero pagas la localización.
review_text_disliked: Para empezar, la "habitación vistas a la piscina" tiene vistas a una charca sucia. Nada de piscina. Necesita una actualización, aunque sí que es cierto que estaba limpio, las tazas por ejemplo, estaban tan usadas que dan la impresión que están sucias, la limpieza de las habitaciones es una limpieza de batalla limpiando únicamente lo que se ve. Las puertas de la terraza no cierran bien, y debido a esto y a las charcas verdes que tiene el hotel, los mosquitos te comen. Las sujeciones de las cortinas estaban rotas, no son cosas graves pero denota en falta de mantenimiento. Está bien, pero por el precio que pagas, estando en el país que estás, esperas algo más. Un hotel es algo más que su exterior.

review_title: Lieu féerique mais pas très honnête....
review_text_liked: Le lieu est incroyable,les bungalows magnifiques, endroit tellement zen. la vue extraordinaire Au coeur d un Village typique où les gens sont adorable Les filles au restaurant sont vraiment adorables Chambre très propre Yoga gratuit avec vue imprenable sur les cultures
review_text_disliked: Le responsable a la réception assez malhonnête et pas arrangeant du tout.on a du louer 2 chambres pour 5 alors qu un des bungalows avaient assez de lit pour 5 mais il n a rien voulu savoir car il disait que c était max 4 personnes par chambre. 1miilions500 de plus pour rien. A proposé un taxi au double du prix qu on a trouvé pour lovina. Scooter loué sans freins mais sans remise..pas d eau vraiment chaude dans les salles de bain.Personne qui gâche ce lieu féerique, dommage, nous n y reviendrons pas à cause de lui

review_text_liked: Room : luas, dengan 2 kamar mandi, 1 bed besar dan 2 bed kecil plus 1 sofa besar, air panas yang melimpah View : bagus, meski ada terhalang pepohonan dan rumput yang tidak terawat, tapi kebun hotel sangat terawat dan bagus, kolam banyak tidak berisi air Breakfast : enak, porsi besar
review_text_disliked: Room : kebersihan masih bisa ditingkatkan, banyak ruangan yang seharusnya bisa memperluas kamar tapi berupa lemari yang tidak jelas untuk apa, debu masih ada di bbrp tempat View : pemandangan bagus namun tidak bisa maksimal menikmati karena setiap pintu dibuka serangga terutama lalat masuk, kamar bisa diakses oleh penghuni kamar sebelah ok tidak ada pembatas jelas antara vila 1 dengan yang lain Breakfast and dinner : pelayanan dirasakan berbeda jika yang datang adalah tamu asing dibandingkan tamu lokal, menginap di kamar yang lebih mahal mendapatkan pelayanan dibawah yang menginap di kamar lebih murah, minimal harusnya standar sama, restaurant kebersihan bisa ditingkatkan masih banyak serangga mati dan jaring laba-laba Weather : tidak diatas awan seperti yang diiklankan, udara sejuk tapi tidak dingin Room service : waktu yang terbatas sehingga kita memilih makan diluar

review_title: Отличный вариант с красивым видом на пару дней
review_text_liked: Номер sunrise. Второй этаж, достаточно просторный, хороший вид, своя беседка, маленький балкон, в номере есть зона с диваном. Нет проблем с горячей водой (газовая колонка). На территории много беседок с хорошим видом. Отдельный павильон для йоги. Бесплатная йога по утрам. Свежий воздух. По вечерам и утрам в футболке и шортах может быть прохладно. Но под одеялом не замерзнете, кондиционера нет и не нужен
review_text_disliked: Очень хорошая слышимость, внизу был ресторан - слышен был даже звон вилок. Хорошо что ресторан рано закрывается. Еда в ресторане - неоднозначно: какие-то блюда вкусные, в тоже время другие - не очень, выбор маленький. Магазинов/ресторанов в пешей доступности нет. Сложно вызвать такси. На ресепшен за такси просят дорого. Например в Бедугул (туда-обратно) за 200к, в ловина бич просят 500к. Спасло приложение indrive, заказывали за день до поездки (опция city to city)

review_text_liked: Fernab von Canngu und damit dem ganzen Verkehrslärm und Smog liegt dieses Hotel sehr idyllisch gelegen direkt in der Natur neben Reis- und Gemüsefeldern. Ein ruhiger Ort zum Entspannen und Runterkommen. Man braucht definitiv einen Motorroller, einen Mietwagen oder ein Taxi, um Dinge unternehmen zu können. Kein Gojek verfügbar. An der Rezeption können Motorroller ausgeliehen werden. Eingeschränkte Auswahl im hoteleigenen Restaurant mit einfachen Gerichten, aber dafür lecker. Sehr freundliches Personal. Man kann eine Dschungel Trekking Tour buchen, welche direkt im Hotel startet. Nähe zur Natur bedeutet auch, dass man nachts den ein oder anderen Gecko hört, kleine Geckos/Eidechsen im Zimmer herumkrabbeln oder ein Vogel auf dem Dach nistet ;-)

C'est plutôt spartiate par rapport à ce que l'on trouve sur un GUEST HOUSE ou un Ressort mais cela vaut le détour. Cours de yoga gratuits tous les matins de 07:00 à 08:00 dans un lieu magique avec une vue splendide. Le lieu du petit déjeuner à aussi la même vue. Cours de cuisine possible : un super moment. Pas mal de chose à faire dans le coin. Je conseille 3 à 4 jours maxi.

review_title: Alojamiento mágico. No puedes perdertelo si vienes a Bali.
review_text_liked: El paisaje que ofrece este alojamiento es absolutamente MÁGICO. La ubicación resulta ideal para recorrer la zona norte de Bali. La comida que sirven en el restaurante del alojamiento está buenísima y muy muy bien de precio. La atención del personal es fabulosa.
review_text_disliked: No les doy un 10, porque no creo que sea compatible lo que venden de este alojamiento (sitio de desconexión y de paz) si luego van a hospedar un grupo de 30 niños entre 10 y 14 años que lo van a revolucionar todo, causando tantas molestias por ruidos, no culpo a los niños, ya que es lo que les toca por su edad. Pero si culpo a la dirección del alojamiento por permitir eso, compartiendo con otros huéspedes que no tenemos culpa. Si quieren convertir su alojamiento en un campus escolar, háganlo solo con los miembros del colegio, y no con otros clientes. Los baños necesitan una actualización. No está preparado para bebés, ya que no hay bañera ni tampoco cunas, o sillas para bebés en el restaurante.

review_title: Супер вид, уютное пространство и милый персонал
review_text_liked: Уютные комнаты, невероятный вид из окна и с террасы ресторана, зал для занятий йогой, йога-инструктор, персонал просто душки, вкусная еда на завтрак, обед и ужин. Благоустроенная територия. Там так уютно и виды такие крутые, что хочется просто лежать и смотреть вдаль.
review_text_disliked: Некоторые элементы комнаты и ванной стали ветхими от времени, но это нивелируется ценой и в общем, отдыхать не мешает.

Благоустроенная територия. Там так уютно и виды такие крутые, что хочется просто лежать и смотреть вдаль. disliked: Некоторые элементы комнаты и ванной стали ветхими от времени, но это нивелируется ценой и в общем, отдыхать не мешает.

review_title: Très beau cadre, magnifiques jardins, mais bungalows vieillots et très humides.
review_text_liked: Les jardins, le cadre, la vue sur la vallée et les rizieres, la très belle végétation, le calme, le personnel, et le restaurant, très bons plats et petits déjeuners !
review_text_disliked: Le côté vieillot des batiments, et surtout des bungalows, qui méritent un coup de frais, d'isolation voire de rénovation. L'isolation acoustique et climatique est casi inexistante. les bungalows sont jolis et se mettent bien dans le cadre, mais étant en bois et pas très récents,, on sent et voit qu'ils ont bien vécu. Les toits sont en paille tressée, sur des latis en bois, c'est joli, mais ca ne protège pas du bruit ni de l'humidité, très présente dans l'air et dans le chalet, qui montrent des taches et qques vétustés. Les lits sont confortables mais les drapts sont humides et sentent un peu, les moustiquaires méritent un sérieux nettoyage. Les lézards occupent les sous-pentes. Il faut croiser les doigts pour qu'ils ne fassent pas de bruit pour vous permettre de vous endormir. Hormis ces aspects qui peuvent en rebuter certains, nous y avons passé un bon séjour de deux nuits lors de notre tour de Bali.

review_title: Schoon van ver, maar ver van schoon.

review_text_disliked: Dit hotel is helemaal niet onderhouden. Overal kropen beesten, het dak was vooral plastic aan onze kamer ipv riet, het restaurant was smerig en ze hadden amper dingen die op hun kaart stonden, de lakens en handdoeken waren vuil, alles voelde en rook klam… dit hotel zouden we zeker niet aanraden. Zelfs het meubilair in de gemeenschappelijke ruimtes was vuil en vies. Het hotel is ook echt slecht gelegen. Een Grab of Gojek komt hier niet naartoe.

review_title: Frische Luft mit schöner Aussicht und wundervollen Personal
review_text_liked: Wir hatten hier das schrecklichste Erlebnis was man als Familie haben kann. Ich möchte nicht ins Detail gehen, aber wir hatten eine Situation, dass uns der Manager höchstpersönlich ins Krankenhaus bringen musste und für all die Unterstützung sind wir sehr dankbar. Das ganze Personal war so freundlich und hilfsbereit von Anfang an. Die Lage der Unterkunft ist wahnsinnig schön. Wir hatten die beiden Zimmer über dem Restaurant, also eine ganze Etage für uns mit Terrasse. Das Restaurantpersonal war auch so lieb und hat uns Essen nach oben gebracht. Die morgendliche Yogasession war sehr schön, authentisches Yoga mit Aussicht. Wenn man so eine Aussicht und so ein liebes Personal hat sieht man von anderen Unannehmlichkeiten gerne ab. (Siehe unten) Aber wisst ihr was das genialste war, die frische Luft auf der Terrasse :)
review_text_disliked: Die Anfahrt ist abenteuerlich, es geht steil runter in die Straße. Der Parkplatz ist vor dem Grundstück. Der Eingang ist dann über eine Brücke zu Fuß erreichbar. (Das soll bloß als Info dienen) Auf dem Bett lag ein wenig Eidechsenkacke, aber kein Wunder, weil das Ganze in die Natur eingebettet ist. Die Liebe Dame von der Rezeption war sofort da hat es weggemacht und mir angeboten die Bettdecke frisch zu beziehen. Oberhalb in der Decke/in der Wand rennt eine kleine Ratte herum und hatte einmal von Innen gegen die Wand gekratzt. Wir sind Camper und finden das nicht schlimm, sie war ja nicht im Zimmer und wie gesagt…das ist die Natur.

review_title: Hôtel calme avec une vue époustouflante :)
review_text_liked: LE CALME ! Un endroit magnifique niché dans la montagne à 10mn de Begudul. Notre villa était top avec une vue époustouflante sur un immense potager et la jungle. La chambre est confortable et douillette. Des chauffeurs sont conseillés par l’hôtel et nous avons gardé le nôtre pour les 3 jours (pour un prix top) qui nous fait découvrir la région (Begudul, Munduk, Lovina…). Pour nous, le meilleur endroit de Bali. Beaucoup moins touristique ! L’hôtel propose du yoga le matin gratuitement et le restaurant est parfait. À DÉCOUVRIR ABSOLUMENT :)

review_text_liked: Esternamente la struttura é da sogno, immersa nel verde e da un punto di vista ottico le sistemazioni sembrano da sogno. Tutto curato all’ esterno. Gentile il personale che al nostro arrivo molto tardi é stato comunque disponibile.
review_text_disliked: La nostra camera era veramente maltenuta e sporca. C’erano milioni di insetti, scarafaggi, ragni e entrando c’era una lucertola gigante che è scappata via dalla fessura del tetto!!! Non ho dormito tranquilla. La vista e l’esterno sono spettacolari, ma una notte di soggiorno senza dormire é stata anche troppo. Per la colazione il personale molto lento. Dopo mezz’ora che non arrivavano a prendere l ordine, sono dovuta andare nella cucina a chiamarli. Per il check out anche non c’era nessuno, ho suonato la campana x 15 minuti. Per fortuna il mio driver ha aspettato paziente.

review_title: Je ne conseillerai à personne cet établissement
review_text_liked: Le côté nature
review_text_disliked: La propreté, la nourriture, le personnel n’était pas très agréable. Nous avons retrouvé des cafards et des araignées dans la salle de bain. De plus, nous avons loué un scooter car le logement est loin de tout et il n’y a AUCUN taxi (pas de Grabb ni de Gojek) et la réception a voulu nous faire payer 150 K alors que sur la feuille des tarifs c’était écrit 100 K car apparement « nous avions un gros scooter » mais à aucun moment on nous a fait choisir la taille de celui ci. De plus les casques étaient cassés et trop grands. Le scooter n’avait pas d’essence (absolument pas il était vide) nous avons fait le plein et l’hôtel n’a pas voulu contribuer financièrement donc nous leur avons donné un plein gratuit…

review_text_disliked: Malheureusement les chambres ne sont pas entretenues comme ils se doit et font abîmées…c’est dommage vu le potentiel du lieu. Nous sommes restés 2 nuits et nous n’avons pas eu d’eau chaude de tout le séjour bien qu’ils soient venus réparer, mais l’eau chaude est redevenue froide à peine 5minutes après que le technicien soit parti. Chambre pas très propre (grosse tache que l’on pouvait grater sur les draps, cheveux et saletés sur le sol… Location de scooter oui, mais super cher, et de loin, comparé à tout ce qu’on a pu louer en 1 mois sur Bali

review_text_liked: Las vistas y el entorno
review_text_disliked: Habia hormigas hasta en la cama. Es cierto que estás en una cabaña en la naturaleza pero se notaba que la limpieza era muy por encima. Me agaché un momento a comprobar que no se hubiese caído nada debajo de la cama y literalmente estaba repleta de telas de araña. Pero repleta. Además de varias cosas como un rollo de papel higiénico, entre otras. También habia telaraña en la repisa del baño y muchísimas en los cristales con arañas enormes incluidas. Aun asi el lugar muy tranquilo y en paz. Y vistas bonitas

review_text_liked: Personnel très aimable
review_text_disliked: Beaucoup trop isolé, on est obligés de prendre les activités de l’hôtel. On a loué des scoots et au moment de payer on nous a augmenté le prix. Et il y a pleins de bêtes.
